overall.description: A static cinematic scene from a video game depicting students in wizard robes gathered in a covered wooden pavilion at a magical school campus. Characters stand around rustic wooden tables while sunlight filters through the open sides, illuminating the stone floor and timber architecture with a lush green landscape visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: standing stationary observing the students gathered in the pavilion

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes with yellow accents standing at a wooden table
group of students conversing near the left support pillar

entered.detail: thick timber columns with diagonal braces supporting the high pitched roof
rustic wooden tables and benches where students are gathered
tall dark wooden cabinet with glass doors against the back wall
sunlit grassy hillside visible through the large open archway
large rectangular stone tiles covering the pavilion floor
metal lanterns suspended from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary throughout this segment, capturing a peaceful scene in a covered wooden pavilion. Students in wizard robes stand scattered around rustic wooden tables, some conversing in small groups while others appear to be waiting. Sunlight streams through the open sides of the pavilion, illuminating the stone floor and timber architecture, with a lush green landscape visible through the central archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze upon a peaceful gathering of students within a sun-drenched magical pavilion. It begins by capturing the quiet atmosphere of the covered wooden structure, where students in wizard robes are scattered around rustic timber tables. As the light streams through the open sides, the camera emphasizes the contrast between the shadowed timber architecture and the brightly illuminated stone floor. The scene then draws the eye toward the central archway, where the interior stillness opens up to reveal a lush, vibrant green landscape in the distance.
